title: Chef Aid Stainless Steel Slotted Spoon, 28 x 12 x 4cm, Silver
features: KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: With its sturdy construction, the Chef Aid Slotted Spoon provides precise stirring and mixing and whether you're preparing sauces, soups, or stews, this spoon ensures thorough blending and even distribution of ingredients
EFFICIENT DRAINING: The slotted design allows for efficient draining, making it perfect for straining liquids from cooked foods such as pasta, vegetables, and more
VERSATILE: Ideal for stirring, draining and serving and being made of Stainless Steel it is designed to handle a variety of tasks with ease. Not just for cooking but this tool is perfect for serving
HANGING LOOP: The Slotted spoon is fitted with a handy hanging loop, meaning this is a perfect space saving option for the home
DISHWASHER SAFE: The Chef Aid Range of Stainless Steel Utensils are Dishwasher safe and can also be hand washed
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
